creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Denis Shaposhnikov from comment #11)

Denis, just in case you didn't notice -- I am the maintainer of tremotesf. Unfortunately, your patch is incorrect -- for example, you bundle cpp-httplib 0.18 which isn't supported by tremotesf at all.

Please take a look at comment #5 and attachment 253560 -- this is how the patch should look like. But actually even a simple ping 'there's new release' will be enough and I'll update the patch.
